title: PCTE Filter Staining Protocol
author: Ken Stedman
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.eavbae6

steps.title: 1 mL of 4 µg/mL Sudan...
steps.instruction: 1 mL of 4 µg/mL Sudan black B solution is added to the funnel and is drawn through the filter at a vacuum pressure of -70 kPa.

steps.title: Suction is applied until the PCTE filter appears dry
steps.instruction: Suction is applied until the PCTE filter appears dry. The flow rate through 30 nm pore PCTE filters is approximately 0.1 mL/min, at -70 kPa using a 25mm diameter funnel.
